chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2339 of 2024 Khalid Musharraf Hussain Zubairi Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on Misc. No.14483/2024. 2. For orders on Misc. No.14484/2024. 3. For order on office objection. 4. For hearing on Misc. No.10675/2024. 5. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 06.08.2024 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Manzoor Alam Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. Inspectors Shabbir Ahmed Chandio and Farhan Abbasi, I.O of case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. In view of the order passed in connected petition No.D- 3258/2024, Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain does not press this petition which is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
